title: codereview: nrf52840_lichen.repl and t_echo/rak4631 .resc do not include or wire NRF52840_BLE peripheral
description: Add include for BLE.cs in resc files. Override radio in repl files following USBD pattern. Wire IRQ to nvic@1. Required for Meshtastic board BLE/LCI support per bead project-LICHEN-r7h4.11.
close_reason: Added BLE.cs include to t_echo.resc and rak4631.resc. Wired radio override in both .repl files (and nrf52840_lichen.repl). Follows USBD pattern, supports LCI/KISS. Second logical chunk complete.
